description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel and a tan synthetic full stock. The barrel is long and slender, featuring a front sight and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The receiver is compact and includes a visible trigger guard and trigger, with a ribbed pump handle located forward of the trigger assembly. The stock is ergonomically shaped for shoulder support and appears to be made of a durable polymer material. Two red shotgun shells are shown alongside the shotgun, indicating its ammunition type.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a black barrel, tan synthetic full stock, and ribbed pump handle, accompanied by two red shotgun shells.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the barrel and the alignment of the tubular magazine below, with two red shells visible to the side.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the tan stock, black barrel, ribbed pump handle, and the two red shells below.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube, with two red shells to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the shotgun's full length, stock, barrel, and pump handle, with no shells visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with tubular magazine beneath, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
